examples: Tis but a banging of the door behind you, a blithesome step forward, and you are out of the old life and into the new!
Soon the rising sun, emerging from amidst golden and purple clouds, shed his blithesome rays on the tin weathercocks of communipaw.
It was once an American catchphrase -- cheery shorthand for a blithesome fact of American democracy: Our presidents come from among us, and have traditionally striven to continue moving among us.
